items.name: dropzone
items.title: MediaDrop Dropzone
items.description: Drag-and-drop file upload block built on react-mediadrop's useMediaDrop hook, with per-file progress and cancel.

items.name: avatar-uploader
items.title: MediaDrop Avatar Uploader
items.description: Circular single-image avatar picker built on react-mediadrop's useMediaDrop hook, with click/drag replace and upload progress.

items.name: multi-file-upload-form
items.title: MediaDrop Multi-File Upload Form
items.description: Multi-file picker with a review list and an explicit submit step — add files, then upload — with per-file progress, cancel, and retry.

items.name: s3-direct-upload
items.title: MediaDrop S3 Direct Upload
items.description: Direct-to-S3 upload block using a presigned PUT URL you supply per file, built on react-mediadrop's xhr-upload transport.
